name: Floor check
definition: Trivial / impossible to fail. Sanity check that the harness and agent both work.

name: Main signal
definition: Unambiguous but hard. Real analytical questions with exactly one correct interpretation. Where you actually compare agents.
scoring_rule: Trust-critical aggregate (when category is trust-critical). Threshold 85%.

name: Judgment calls
definition: Ambiguous by design — multiple valid interpretations. Tests whether the agent recognizes ambiguity.
scoring_rule: Calibration aggregate (ambiguity_handling, refusal_scope). Threshold 80%. Judged on explanation, not exec_match.
